findings.summary: Deferred obligation: wire the committed stub workflow under spikes/dafny-compat/ci/ as a permanent CI job when the CI feature lands (spike suite becomes CI-enforced). Dischargeable only by the CI feature's spec.
Deferred obligation: promote ADR-0001 from provisional to accepted (or supersede with counter-evidence) — inherited by the final Phase 0.0 feature's spec.
